metadata.description: AI agent skills for Nutrient APIs and SDKs

plugins.name: nutrient-dws
plugins.description: Document processing skills powered by the Nutrient Document Web Services API. Convert, merge, split, OCR, extract, watermark, redact, sign, optimize, protect, and reorder documents.

plugins.name: make-pdf
plugins.description: Generate finished PDFs from Markdown or HTML — accessible PDF/UA, archival PDF/A, watermarks, batch — with built-in conformance verification.

plugins.name: remediate-pdf
plugins.description: Remediate existing PDFs: auto-tag with PDF/UA semantic structure via the Nutrient DWS Accessibility API, then check the result with the bundled verifier.

plugins.name: pdf-to-markdown
plugins.description: Extract text as structured, semantic Markdown from a PDF.

plugins.name: pdf-to-text
plugins.description: Extract layout-preserving plain text from a PDF.

plugins.name: query
plugins.description: Find the most relevant passages in an already-extracted document (the text or Markdown output of pdf-to-markdown / pdf-to-text) with ranked (BM-25) search.

plugins.name: nutrient-sdk-dev
plugins.description: Skills for developing with Nutrient SDKs: Web Viewer, Document Authoring, Mobile (iOS/Android/React Native/Flutter/MAUI), Server (Python/Java/Node.js/.NET), self-hosted Nutrient Document Engine, and Nutrient AI Assistant.
